inputs.label: Catchment Area
inputs.businessContext: The surface area of the catchment contributing to runoff.

inputs.label: Runoff Coefficient (C)
inputs.businessContext: Dimensionless coefficient representing the fraction of rainfall that becomes runoff, depending on surface type and slope.

inputs.label: Rainfall Intensity (I)
inputs.businessContext: Design rainfall intensity in millimeters per hour, typically derived from IDF curves for the specified duration and return period.

inputs.label: Safety Factor
inputs.businessContext: Multiplier applied to the calculated runoff to account for uncertainties and future changes in catchment conditions.
